meta.title: Another Storm Brewing Over Potential UN Regulation of the In
meta.description: Please join Hudson Institute's Center on Economics of the Internet for an address on UN internet regulation by Ambassador David Gross. Ambassador Gross is currently a partner at Wiley Rein, LLP and is one of the world's foremost experts on international telecommunications, having addressed the United Nations General Assembly and led more U.S. delegations at major international telecommunication conferences than anyone in modern history. Drawing on his more than 25 years of experience as a global
